visuals.title: Core Principles of Software Engineering
visuals.description: Animated visual covering SOLID, DRY, KISS, Separation of Concerns, Modularity, Cohesion, and Quality Attributes
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="400" data-topic-id="core-principles">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bgGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E8EAF6"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#C5CAE9"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="400" fill="url(#bgGrad)" rx="12"/>

  <!-- G1: Title with underline (begin=0.3s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="Core Principles of Software Engineering guide developers to write clean, maintainable, and scalable code.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="28" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Core Principles of Software Engineering</text>
    <line x1="60" y1="34" x2="360" y2="34" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- G2: SOLID Principles - 5 lettered blocks (begin=1.5s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="SOLID principles form the foundation: Single Responsibility, Open-Closed, Liskov Substitution, Interface Segregation, and Dependency Inversion.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="55" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">SOLID Principles</text>
    <!-- S -->
    <rect x="22" y="62" width="68" height="44" rx="6" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="56" y="78" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" fill="#FFF">S</text>
    <text x="56" y="98" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#E8EAF6">Single Resp.</text>
    <!-- O -->
    <rect x="98" y="62" width="68" height="44" rx="6" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="132" y="78" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" fill="#FFF">O</text>
    <text x="132" y="98" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#E0F2F1">Open-Closed</text>
    <!-- L -->
    <rect x="174" y="62" width="68" height="44" rx="6" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="208" y="78" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" fill="#FFF">L</text>
    <text x="208" y="98" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#FFF3E0">Liskov Subst.</text>
    <!-- I -->
    <rect x="250" y="62" width="68" height="44" rx="6" fill="#C62828"/>
    <text x="284" y="78" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" fill="#FFF">I</text>
    <text x="284" y="98" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#FFEBEE">Interface Seg.</text>
    <!-- D -->
    <rect x="326" y="62" width="68" height="44" rx="6" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="360" y="78" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" fill="#FFF">D</text>
    <text x="360" y="98" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#E8EAF6">Dep. Inversion</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G3: DRY and KISS (begin=3.0s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="DRY means Don't Repeat Yourself: extract duplicated code into reusable functions. KISS means Keep It Simple: prefer straightforward solutions over complex ones.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <!-- DRY -->
    <rect x="15" y="116" width="192" height="68" rx="8" fill="#FFF" fill-opacity="0.7" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="111" y="132" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">DRY - Don't Repeat Yourself</text>
    <!-- Before -->
    <rect x="22" y="138" width="82" height="38" rx="4" fill="#FFCDD2"/>
    <text x="63" y="152" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">funcA() { log(); }</text>
    <text x="63" y="163" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">funcB() { log(); }</text>
    <text x="63" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">Before (duplicated)</text>
    <!-- Arrow -->
    <text x="111" y="162" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#00695C">→</text>
    <!-- After -->
    <rect x="118" y="138" width="82" height="38" rx="4" fill="#C8E6C9"/>
    <text x="159" y="152" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#2E7D32">shared() { log(); }</text>
    <text x="159" y="163" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#2E7D32">funcA/B use shared</text>
    <text x="159" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#2E7D32">After (reused)</text>
    <!-- KISS -->
    <rect x="215" y="116" width="192" height="68" rx="8" fill="#FFF" fill-opacity="0.7" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="311" y="132" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#E65100">KISS - Keep It Simple</text>
    <!-- Before -->
    <rect x="222" y="138" width="82" height="38" rx="4" fill="#FFCDD2"/>
    <text x="263" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">if(a){if(b){</text>
    <text x="263" y="159" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">  if(c){...}}}</text>
    <text x="263" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#C62828">Complex nesting</text>
    <!-- Arrow -->
    <text x="311" y="162" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#E65100">→</text>
    <!-- After -->
    <rect x="318" y="138" width="82" height="38" rx="4" fill="#C8E6C9"/>
    <text x="359" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#2E7D32">if(!a) return;</text>
    <text x="359" y="159" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="7" fill="#2E7D32">if(!b) return;</text>
    <text x="359" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#2E7D32">Early returns</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G4: Separation of Concerns - Layered Architecture (begin=4.5s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="Separation of Concerns divides the system into distinct layers: Presentation handles UI, Business Logic processes rules, and Data Layer manages persistence.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="111" y="204" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Separation of Concerns</text>
    <!-- UI Layer -->
    <rect x="30" y="210" width="162" height="26" rx="5" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="111" y="228" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#FFF">Presentation (UI)</text>
    <!-- Arrow down -->
    <text x="111" y="247" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#3949AB">▼</text>
    <!-- Logic Layer -->
    <rect x="30" y="250" width="162" height="26" rx="5" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="111" y="268" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#FFF">Business Logic</text>
    <!-- Arrow down -->
    <text x="111" y="287" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#00695C">▼</text>
    <!-- Data Layer -->
    <rect x="30" y="290" width="162" height="26" rx="5" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="111" y="308" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#FFF">Data Layer (DB)</text>
    <!-- Benefit label -->
    <text x="111" y="328" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#3949AB" font-style="italic">Each layer has a single responsibility</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G5: Modularity and Cohesion (begin=6.0s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="Modularity means building independent modules. High cohesion keeps related functions together within a module. Low coupling minimizes dependencies between modules.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="6.0s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="315" y="204" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">Modularity & Cohesion</text>
    <!-- Module A - High Cohesion -->
    <rect x="232" y="212" width="76" height="54" rx="6" fill="#E8F5E9" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="270" y="226" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">Module A</text>
    <circle cx="254" cy="242" r="6" fill="#00695C"/>
    <circle cx="270" cy="242" r="6" fill="#00695C"/>
    <circle cx="286" cy="242" r="6" fill="#00695C"/>
    <line x1="254" y1="248" x2="270" y2="248" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <line x1="270" y1="248" x2="286" y2="248" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="270" y="262" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="6" fill="#00695C">High Cohesion</text>
    <!-- Module B - High Cohesion -->
    <rect x="320" y="212" width="76" height="54" rx="6" fill="#FFF3E0" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="358" y="226" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#E65100">Module B</text>
    <circle cx="342" cy="242" r="6" fill="#E65100"/>
    <circle cx="358" cy="242" r="6" fill="#E65100"/>
    <circle cx="374" cy="242" r="6" fill="#E65100"/>
    <line x1="342" y1="248" x2="358" y2="248" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <line x1="358" y1="248" x2="374" y2="248" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="358" y="262" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="6" fill="#E65100">High Cohesion</text>
    <!-- Low Coupling dashed line between modules -->
    <line x1="308" y1="239" x2="320" y2="239" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
    <!-- Module C -->
    <rect x="275" y="274" width="80" height="54" rx="6" fill="#FFEBEE" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="315" y="288" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">Module C</text>
    <circle cx="299" cy="304" r="6" fill="#C62828"/>
    <circle cx="315" cy="304" r="6" fill="#C62828"/>
    <circle cx="331" cy="304" r="6" fill="#C62828"/>
    <line x1="299" y1="310" x2="315" y2="310" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <line x1="315" y1="310" x2="331" y2="310" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="315" y="324" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="6" fill="#C62828">High Cohesion</text>
    <!-- Low coupling dashed lines to Module C -->
    <line x1="270" y1="266" x2="295" y2="274" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
    <line x1="358" y1="266" x2="335" y2="274" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
    <text x="315" y="340" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#00695C" font-style="italic">Dashed lines = Low Coupling</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G6: Quality Attributes (begin=7.5s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="These core principles collectively support key quality attributes: Maintainability, Testability, Reusability, Scalability, and Reliability of the software system.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="7.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="360" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Quality Attributes Supported by Principles</text>
    <!-- Quality badges -->
    <rect x="16" y="368" width="72" height="22" rx="11" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="52" y="383" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#FFF">Maintainability</text>
    <rect x="96" y="368" width="62" height="22" rx="11" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="127" y="383" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#FFF">Testability</text>
    <rect x="166" y="368" width="62" height="22" rx="11" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="197" y="383" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#FFF">Reusability</text>
    <rect x="236" y="368" width="62" height="22" rx="11" fill="#C62828"/>
    <text x="267" y="383" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#FFF">Scalability</text>
    <rect x="306" y="368" width="62" height="22" rx="11" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="337" y="383" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#FFF">Reliability</text>
    <!-- Connecting line -->
    <circle cx="52" cy="365" r="2" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <circle cx="127" cy="365" r="2" fill="#00695C"/>
    <circle cx="197" cy="365" r="2" fill="#E65100"/>
    <circle cx="267" cy="365" r="2" fill="#C62828"/>
    <circle cx="337" cy="365" r="2" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <line x1="52" y1="365" x2="337" y2="365" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="2,2"/>
  </g>
</svg>
